article_title: Preclinical Evidence of Rapid-Onset Antidepressant-Like Effect in Radix Polygalae Extract

aggregated_relations.subject: Radix Polygalae extract
evidence_sentences: RP extract has reduced dopamine-induced oxidative stress and protected cortical neurons from NMDA toxicity [20], [21].

aggregated_relations.subject: YZ-50
evidence_sentences: YZ-50 also increased brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) and Tyrosine kinase B (TrkB) receptor expression, which may induce hippocampal neurogenesis similarly to other antidepressant reagents [24].

evidence_sentences: Because RP protected cultured neurons from NMDA toxicity and induced BDNF expression [25], we hypothesized that it modulates glutamatergic synapses to effect rapid-onset (within minutes or hours) antidepressant-like properties.

chunks_extracted.section: Screening for dose and time dependency of Radix Polygalae's antidepressant effect

aggregated_relations.subject: RP
evidence_sentences: RP 1 mg/kg reduced immobility relative to distilled water controls (p=0.006).

causal_tuples.subject: RP
causal_tuples.evidence_sentence: RP 1 mg/kg reduced immobility relative to distilled water controls (p=0.006).

chunks_extracted.section: Assessing the rapid-onset antidepressant-like effect of Radix Polygalae
Assessing the rapid-onset antidepressant-like effect of Radix Polygalae
Radix Polygalae regulates phosphorylation of the GluR1 AMPA receptor subunit but not mTOR in the hippocampus

aggregated_relations.subject: RP
evidence_sentences: RP treatment (0.1 mg/kg p.o.) reduced hippocampal GluR1 phosphorylation (S845) but not when RP was co-administered with NBQX (10 mg/kg, i.p.) [F(2,15) = 4.38, p = 0.032].

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: Ketamine rapidly activated this pathway, leading to an increase in the number of synaptic spines in the prefrontal cortex [15].

aggregated_relations.subject: RP
evidence_sentences: The finding of decreased GluR1 phosphorylation at Ser 845 following administration of RP, as well as the abolishment of this effect by AMPA blocker NBQX, is thus consistent with a mechanism in which RP exerts antidepressive effect by antagonizing NMDA, but not AMPA, activity.

causal_tuples.subject: RP
causal_tuples.evidence_sentence: RP treatment (0.1 mg/kg p.o.) reduced hippocampal GluR1 phosphorylation (S845) but not when RP was co-administered with NBQX (10 mg/kg, i.p.) [F(2,15) = 4.38, p = 0.032].

causal_tuples.subject: ketamine
causal_tuples.evidence_sentence: Ketamine rapidly activated this pathway, leading to an increase in the number of synaptic spines in the prefrontal cortex [15].

causal_tuples.subject: RP
causal_tuples.evidence_sentence: The finding of decreased GluR1 phosphorylation at Ser 845 following administration of RP, as well as the abolishment of this effect by AMPA blocker NBQX, is thus consistent with a mechanism in which RP exerts antidepressive effect by antagonizing NMDA, but not AMPA, activity.

aggregated_relations.subject: tenuifolin
evidence_sentences: RP extract contains various substances like tenuigenin, tenuifolin, DISS (3,6′-disinapoyl sucrose), and TMCA (3,4,5-trimethoxycinnamic acid) previously shown to have proliferative and protective effects on hippocampal neurons (tenuigenin) [63], [64], inhibit amyloid-β secretion and improve cognitive function (tenuifolin) [65], [66]exert antidepressant-like effects in chronically stressed rats (DISS) [67], and ameliorate the behavioral effects of cold stress and corticotrophin-releasing hormone administration in rats (TMCA) [68]

RP extract contains various substances like tenuigenin, tenuifolin, DISS (3,6′-disinapoyl sucrose), and TMCA (3,4,5-trimethoxycinnamic acid) previously shown to have proliferative and protective effects on hippocampal neurons (tenuigenin) [63], [64], inhibit amyloid-β secretion and improve cognitive function (tenuifolin) [65], [66]exert antidepressant-like effects in chronically stressed rats (DISS) [67], and ameliorate the behavioral effects of cold stress and corticotrophin-releasing hormone administration in rats (TMCA) [68].

aggregated_relations.subject: NBQX
evidence_sentences: In our study, the effect of RP in the TST was blocked by pretreatment with the AMPA antagonist NBQX, indicating the possibility of a similar interaction between RP and NMDA the mGlu2/3 receptors.

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: NMDA receptor subtype-specific antagonists like ketamine have been found to produce antidepressant-like effects in clinical and preclinical paradigms [6], [12], [13], [54].

aggregated_relations.subject: NBQX
evidence_sentences: Among these, NMDA antagonists and mGlu2/3 antagonists were suggested to have rapid-onset antidepressant-like effects in association with the activation of AMPA receptor and mTOR, effects that were blocked when AMPA receptors were occupied by NBQX [60], [61].

aggregated_relations.subject: NBQX
evidence_sentences: In our study, the effect of RP in the TST was blocked by pretreatment with the AMPA antagonist NBQX, indicating the possibility of a similar interaction between RP and NMDA the mGlu2/3 receptors.
